    99

   111	            if sanitize is not None:
   112	                exporter.sanitize_html = sanitize.lower() == "true"

   116	        # give its path to nbconvert.
   117	        if hasattr(self.contents_manager, "_get_os_path"):

   119	            ext_resources_dir, _basename = os.path.split(os_path)
   120	        else:
   121	            ext_resources_dir = None

   124	        name = model["name"]
   125	        if model["type"] != "notebook":
   126	            # not a notebook, redirect to files
   127	            return FilesRedirectHandler.redirect_to_files(self, path)

   139	            "config_dir": self.application.settings["config_dir"],
   140	        }

   178	    async def post(self, format):
   179	        """Convert a notebook file to a desired format."""
   180	        exporter = get_exporter(format, config=self.config)
   181	
   182	        model = self.get_json_body()
   183	        assert model is not None
   184	        name = model.get("name", "notebook.ipynb")
   185	        nbnode = from_dict(model["content"])
   186	
   187	        try:
   188	            output, resources = await run_sync(
   189	                lambda: exporter.from_notebook_node(
   190	                    nbnode,
   191	                    resources={
   192	                        "metadata": {"name": name[: name.rfind(".")]},
   193	                        "config_dir": self.application.settings["config_dir"],
   194	                    },
   195	                )
   196	            )
   197	        except Exception as e:
   198	            raise web.HTTPError(500, "nbconvert failed: %s" % e) from e
   199	
   200	        if respond_zip(self, name, output, resources):
   201	            return
   202	
   203	        # MIME type
   204	        if exporter.output_mimetype:
   205	            self.set_header("Content-Type", "%s; charset=utf-8" % exporter.output_mimetype)
   206	
   207	        self.finish(output)

Implemented the XSS remediation described in `FINDING.txt`.

Changed:
- [jupyter_server/nbconvert/handlers.py](/work/jupyter_server/nbconvert/handlers.py): added sandboxed CSP for both nbconvert handlers: `sandbox allow-scripts`, enabled by default.
- [jupyter_server/serverapp.py](/work/jupyter_server/serverapp.py): added `ServerApp.nbconvert_csp_sandbox` config and passed it into Tornado settings.
- [tests/nbconvert/test_handlers.py](/work/tests/nbconvert/test_handlers.py): added GET and POST regression coverage for enabled and disabled sandbox behavior.

Validation:
- Passed: `python -m py_compile jupyter_server/nbconvert/handlers.py jupyter_server/serverapp.py tests/nbconvert/test_handlers.py`
- Could not run pytest: this container does not have `pytest` installed.

I also cross-checked the remediation shape against the published advisory for CVE-2026-44727 / GHSA-fcw5-x6j4-ccmp: https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcw5-x6j4-ccmp
